name: Carmel Apple Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
2. Grease a 13-inch x 9-inch baking pan.
3. In a large bowl, beat Crisco and brown sugar with an electric mixer on medium speed until well combined.
4. Add egg and beat until blended.
5. In a separate bowl, mix together 1-1/2 cups flour, salt, and baking soda.
6. Beat the flour mixture into the Crisco mixture on low speed (or by hand) until just combined.
7. Stir in oats. Set aside 1-1/4 cups of the oat mixture for topping.
8. Press remaining mixture into the prepared pan.
9. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 10 minutes.
10. Meanwhile, toss apples with 2 tablespoons flour and lemon juice. Spread apple mixture evenly over prebaked crust.
11. Press in lightly.
12. Drizzle melted caramel evenly over apples.
13. Crumble the reserved topping evenly over the caramel.
14. Bake until apples are tender and top is golden brown (30-40 minutes).
15. Remove from oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
16. Cut into bars.
